complaintTypes.label: No Power / Supply Outage
complaintTypes.description: Report a power cut, broken line, or transformer spark

steps.title: Check Outage Schedule
steps.details: Verify if your area is undergoing scheduled maintenance.

steps.title: Call 1912 Helpline
steps.details: Call the 24x7 BESCOM helpline at 1912. Provide your RR Number or Account ID.

steps.title: WhatsApp BESCOM
steps.details: Send a message to 9483191212 / 9483191222 with your location.

steps.title: Escalate to AEE
steps.details: If unresolved, contact your sub-division Assistant Executive Engineer (AEE).

complaintTypes.label: Billing / Meter Error
complaintTypes.description: Incorrect bill amount or faulty meter reading

steps.title: Raise via BESCOM Mithra App
steps.details: Download the official app, link your account, and raise a billing dispute ticket.

steps.title: Visit Subdivision Office
steps.details: Take a copy of your current bill and the previous month's bill to your local BESCOM office.

steps.title: Escalate to CGRF
steps.details: If the sub-division rejects your claim, file a petition with the Consumer Grievance Redressal Forum (CGRF).

rtiTemplate.template:
To,
The Public Information Officer (PIO)
BESCOM Corporate Office, K.R. Circle
Bengaluru - 560001

Subject: Application under RTI Act 2005 regarding complaint status.

Respected Sir/Madam,
I, {NAME}, kindly request you to provide the status and action taken report for my complaint ID: {COMPLAINT_ID} regarding {ISSUE_DESCRIPTION}.

Please provide copies of the file notings related to this complaint.

Regards,
{NAME}
